s3.bucket.inventoryconfiguration.Destina.Docs: Contains information about where to publish the inventory results.

s3.bucket.inventoryconfiguration.Enabled.Docs: Specifies whether the inventory is enabled or disabled. If set to `True`, an inventory list is generated. If set to `False`, no inventory list is generated.

s3.bucket.inventoryconfiguration.Id.Docs: The ID used to identify the inventory configuration.

s3.bucket.inventoryconfiguration.Include.Docs: Object versions to include in the inventory list. If set to `All`, the list includes all the object versions, which adds the version-related fields `VersionId`, `IsLatest`, and `DeleteMarker` to the list. If set to `Current`, the list does not contain these version-related fields.

s3.bucket.inventoryconfiguration.Optiona.Docs: Contains the optional fields that are included in the inventory results.
s3.bucket.inventoryconfiguration.Optiona.Valid values: Size | LastModifiedDate | StorageClass | ETag | IsMultipartUploaded | ReplicationStatus | EncryptionStatus | ObjectLockRetainUntilDate | ObjectLockMode | ObjectLockLegalHoldStatus | IntelligentTieringAccessTier | BucketKeyStatus

s3.bucket.inventoryconfiguration.Schedul.Docs: Specifies the schedule for generating inventory results.
